description: Configure automatic backup settings and backup retention policies.

fields.name: auto_backup
fields.label: Automatic Backups
fields.checkbox_label: Enable automatic backups when content is saved
fields.help: Creates a backup every time you save content in the admin panel.

fields.name: backup_interval
fields.label: Backup Interval
fields.help: How often to create automatic backups (requires cron setup).

fields.name: max_backups
fields.label: Maximum Backups to Keep
fields.help: Older backups will be automatically deleted. Set to 0 for unlimited.

fields.name: backup_notification_email
fields.label: Notification Email
fields.help: Receive email notifications when backups are created (optional).

fields.name: include_images
fields.label: Include Images in Backup
fields.checkbox_label: Backup uploaded images and media files
fields.help: Warning: This can significantly increase backup size.

fields.name: compression
fields.label: Compression
fields.checkbox_label: Compress backups to save disk space
fields.help: Uses ZIP compression for backup files.
